return(function(t,f,L,o,u,p,q,U,a,C,d,h,M,A,n,m,E,v,T,S,i,O,N)A,m,i,h,a,M,S,O,T,d,C,U,n,E,v,N=function(t,l)local f=N(l)local L=function(L,o,u,p)return U(t,{L,o;u;p},l,f)end return L v[U],C[U]=nil,nil end U=t[l]end end,function(t,l)local f=N(l)local L=function(L)return U(t,{L},l,f)end return L end,function(t,l)local f=N(l)local L=function(L,o,u)return U(t,{L;o,u},l,f)end return L end,{},function(U,L,o,u)local Cv,tv,G,B,I,V,j,i,x,J,Lv,P,ov,c,y,s,fv,Y,W,pv,S,Q,w,e,k,v,O,z,F,K,N,R,qv,r,g,Z,q,H,lv,D,Uv,uv,b,X while U do if U<7138018-(-191187)then if U<3274313-(-903268)then if
